assessmentQuestionVersion.name: OTHER SKILLS AND CONDITIONS
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText:
OTHER SKILLS AND CONDITIONS - INCLUDING:
  • Acute psychiatric illness
  • Alcohol overdose and withdrawal symptoms
  • Management of poisonings
  • Management of drowning and near drowning
  • Management of patients with altered level of consciousness
  • Other procedures necessary to save life or limb
  • Evaluation and management of pediatric and neonatal illnesses, injury and emergencies
  • Performing and interpreting bedside ultrasound
